use askama::Template;
use actix_web::{HttpResponse, web};
use actix_web::body::BodyStream;
use futures::stream;

#[derive(Template)]
#[template(path = "welcome.html")]
struct WelcomeTemplate {
    username: String,
    items: Vec<String>,
}

async fn welcome_page(username: String, items: Vec<String>) -> HttpResponse {
    let tmpl = WelcomeTemplate { username, items };
    // GOOD: render directly into streaming response body
    let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel(1);
    tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
        let mut buf = Vec::new();
        tmpl.write_into(&mut buf).unwrap();
        let _ = tx.blocking_send(buf);
    });
    let stream = tokio_stream::wrappers::ReceiverStream::new(rx);
    HttpResponse::Ok()
        .content_type("text/html")
        .streaming(stream)
}
